summary: Planned conservative non-mutating inventory classifications for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is a live PR inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-routing action is recommended from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Open maintainer-owned test/QA PR with passing proof and no dedupe relationship in this inventory shard; keep for normal maintainer review rather than close or merge in plan mode.

Open broad feature PR with failing proof/automation and possible remaining plugin work; not low-signal enough for closure from this artifact and not merge/fix eligible in this job, so keep independent for ordinary maintainer triage.
Focused open bug-fix PR with sufficient proof but incomplete diff/file detail in the artifact and merge disabled by job; keep independent for maintainer review.
Draft Feishu routing PR with explicit remaining broader scope and needs-proof status; keep independent and non-mutating rather than close or merge.
Focused open installer PR with supplied proof and green checks, but merge is blocked by job frontmatter and requires maintainer technical review; keep independent.
